title: streblosa lampongensis
intro: Streblosa lampongensis, also known as the Lambong tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which have been attributed to its alkaloid and flavonoid compounds. The health benefits of Streblosa lampongensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. Herbal preparations of the plant may include infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
